description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat green roof and a spacious, open layout surrounded by a low decorative wall. The front yard includes a driveway with parked cars, a hot tub, and a landscaped garden with trees and shrubs. The backyard boasts a large rectangular swimming pool, sun loungers, and a shaded outdoor seating area. The building itself is primarily white and black with large windows and sliding glass doors, providing ample natural light. The property is accented by various plants and trees, creating a lush, inviting atmosphere. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor living areas.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with a pool, landscaped gardens, and large windows, surrounded by a decorative wall.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, hot tub, main entrance, and pool area with sun loungers.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the pool, sun loungers, and extensive garden with trees and shrubs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the bungalow, garden, and minimal window openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view featuring the pool, outdoor seating, and the side facade of the bungalow.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
